since_last: 68% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.23%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -0.75% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 68% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.23%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.23%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TLN is the standout at +4.77%
cards.body: Leaders: TLN +4.77%, ASML +3.94%, LRCX +3.87%, KLAC +3.85%, MU +3.66%. Laggards: DDOG -0.81%, EQIX -0.79%, BIDU -0.77%, AAPL -0.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.69% at $163.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
